metadata.description: Give Claude new tools just by asking. API keys stay in your vault (never in config or chat), new tools get safety-checked, and it all runs locally with no cloud and no Docker. Plus a template for team-wide always-on tools.

plugins.name: mcp-secure
plugins.description: Add tools to Claude in plain language. Keys stay in your vault (never in config or chat), new tools are safety-checked, and you're warned if one changes later. Runs locally, no cloud. Start with /mcp-secure:setup.

plugins.name: mcp-globals
plugins.description: Optional template for a set of always-on tools that load in every project (e.g. Slack at work, or a personal home set). Copy it per profile and install where it applies.
